humectant.label: Humectant
humectant.definition: Draws moisture into the skin by binding water molecules.

occlusive.label: Occlusive
occlusive.definition: Forms a physical barrier to lock in moisture and prevent water loss.

emollient.label: Emollient
emollient.definition: Softens and smooths skin by filling gaps between surface cells.

antioxidant.label: Antioxidant
antioxidant.definition: Neutralises free radicals to protect skin from environmental damage.

aha.label: AHA
aha.definition: Alpha-hydroxy acid that exfoliates the skin surface by dissolving dead-cell bonds.

bha.label: BHA
bha.definition: Beta-hydroxy acid that exfoliates inside pores — oil-soluble so it cuts through sebum.

pha.label: PHA
pha.definition: Polyhydroxy acid — gentler exfoliant with larger molecules and added humectant properties.

retinoid.label: Retinoid
retinoid.definition: Vitamin A derivative that accelerates cell turnover and boosts collagen synthesis.

peptide.label: Peptide
peptide.definition: Short amino acid chain that signals skin cells to produce more collagen or reduce inflammation.

sunscreen_filter.label: UV Filter
sunscreen_filter.definition: Absorbs or reflects UV radiation to protect against photodamage.

anti_inflammatory.label: Anti-inflammatory
anti_inflammatory.definition: Calms redness, irritation, and inflammatory skin responses.

brightening.label: Brightening
brightening.definition: Inhibits melanin production or dispersal to even skin tone and fade dark spots.

antimicrobial.label: Antimicrobial
antimicrobial.definition: Kills or inhibits acne-causing bacteria and microbes on skin.

sebum_regulator.label: Sebum Regulator
sebum_regulator.definition: Reduces excess oil production to control shine and congestion.

barrier_repair.label: Barrier Repair
barrier_repair.definition: Replenishes key lipids or proteins to restore the skin's protective barrier.

keratolytic.label: Keratolytic
keratolytic.definition: Breaks down keratin buildup to soften rough, flaky, or thickened skin.

depigmenting.label: Depigmenting
depigmenting.definition: Actively reduces existing pigmentation by blocking the melanin synthesis pathway.

soothing.label: Soothing
soothing.definition: Reduces sensitivity, tightness, and reactive skin responses.

growth_factor.label: Growth Factor
growth_factor.definition: Proteins that signal skin repair, cell proliferation, and collagen production.
